title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE's DJ VIDEO🎧
【Dizzy and high】
old rock.slow bossa.avant pop feat. The High Llamas and more hypnotic  tune.
flower power. no war.


今回はNora Guthrie - "Emily's Illness"からTommy Roe – “It’s Now Winter’s Day”へのシーンをお届け。
The High Llamasを思わせるようなエレクトロニカ調のサウンドが光る楽曲から光沢のある機械音と温かみのあるヴォーカルの共存が魅力の楽曲への繋ぎをお楽しみください。

This time, we’re bringing you a scene from Nora Guthrie’s “Emily’s Illness” to Tommy Roe’s “It’s Now Winter’s Day.”
Enjoy the transition from a track with an electronica-tinged sound that recalls The High Llamas to one whose charm lies in the coexistence of glossy mechanical tones and warm vocals.
